zh.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry是Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry和Lady Mary Fitzmaurice的兒子，於1447年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利吉爾卡申。他和Mary Fitz Maurice至少有1個兒子。他於1525年在愛爾蘭被列為member of parliament, house of lords。他去世於1537年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克享年90歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克巴林可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry是Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry和Lady Mary Fitzmaurice的儿子，于1447年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利吉爾卡申。他和Mary Fitz Maurice至少有1个儿子。他于1525年在爱尔兰被列为member of parliament, house of lords。他去世于1537年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克享年90岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克巴林可利。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Cormac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional Irish name, of uncertain origin. It has been a very popular name in Ireland from the earliest times, and in modern times has been taken up in the wider English-speaking world .

en.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry was born in 1447, in Kilcash, County Tipperary, Ireland as the son of Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry and Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. He had at least 1 son with Mary Fitz Maurice. In 1525, at the age of 78, his occupation is listed as member of parliament, house of lords in Ireland. He died in 1537, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 90, and was buried in Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry est né en 1447, à Kilcash, County Tipperary, Irlande, fils de Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry et Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary Fitz Maurice. En 1525, à l’âge de 78 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament, house of lords à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1537, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry wurde 1447 in Kilcash, County Tipperary, Irland, als Sohn von Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry und Lady Mary Fitzmaurice geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Fitz Maurice mindestens 1 Sohn. 1525, als er 78 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament, house of lords in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1537 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Cork, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry è nato il nel 1447 nel Kilcash, County Tipperary, Irlanda come figlio di Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry e Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary Fitz Maurice. Nel 1525, all'età di 78 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament, house of lords nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1537, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerryは1447年にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリーキルカッシュでCormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of MuskerryとLady Mary Fitzmauriceの息子として生まれた。彼はMary Fitz Mauriceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1525年，78歳の時，アイルランドでの職業はmember of parliament, house of lordsと記録されている。彼は1537年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで90歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクボーリンコリグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry(은)는 1447년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 킬카시에서 Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry(와)과 Lady Mary Fitzmaurice의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mary Fitz Maurice(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1525년, 78세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 member of parliament, house of lords이었다. 그는 1537년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크 바링콜리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry nasceu em 1447, em Kilcash, County Tipperary, Irlanda filho de Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry e Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary Fitz Maurice. Em 1525, com 78 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament, house of lords em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1537, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry родился в 1447 г. в местности килкаш, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry и Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary Fitz Maurice. В 1525 году, в возрасте 78 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament, house of lords в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1537 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности баллинколлиг, корк, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry nació en 1447, en Kilcash, County Tipperary, Irlanda como hijo de Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry y Lady Mary Fitzmaurice. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mary Fitz Maurice. En 1525, a la edad de 78 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament, house of lords en Irlanda. Murió en 1537, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Ballincollig, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda.
